type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
RPG operates on a standby basis with variability in annual generation and associated fuel consumption. 
Previously, emission factors from US EPA AP-42 were being used. 
This year the CEPEI developed Natural Gas Calculation tool was used (with specified turbine type) alongside the NPRI toolbox calculation tool developed by Environment Canada "Large Stationary Diesel Engines"
